_comment: BrowserStack App Automate capability template. NO secrets in this file. The access key is injected at runtime from the DEVICE_FARM_TOKEN environment variable; the ${DEVICE_FARM_TOKEN} / ${BROWSERSTACK_USERNAME} tokens below are placeholders documented in README and resolved by the framework, never stored literally.
_app_comment: Upload your synthetic build to BrowserStack and reference the resulting bs://<hashed-app-id>. Placeholder only.

bstack:options._credentials_comment: userName and accessKey are placeholders. They are populated from env vars BROWSERSTACK_USERNAME and DEVICE_FARM_TOKEN at runtime. Do NOT commit real values.
bstack:options._biometric_comment: Biometric injection is driven at runtime by BiometricHelper. Real-device biometric support varies by farm capability.
